description: A minimal standalone program that prints one line of text and exits. Validated against the real transpiler across 20 variations (different program names and messages), all parse/emit/compile/link/run clean.

message.desc: the exact text to print -- inserted inside the quotes as-is, including any literal \n if the plan asks for one

common_mistakes: Do not add a second `print` or any statement after the one shown -- a standalone program with a single message needs exactly this one line.
example:
program HelloWorld
    print the text "Hello" and newline
end program
